description_long: This house features a clean, white stucco exterior with vibrant blue accents on doors, windows, and railings, evoking a Mediterranean or Cycladic architectural style. The structure is two stories tall, with an external staircase leading to the upper floor and multiple balconies with blue railings. The ground level includes a small garden area with a table and chairs, as well as potted plants and a large tree, adding greenery to the urban setting. Windows and doors are distributed asymmetrically, with some featuring shutters and others with decorative trim. The roof is flat, typical of Mediterranean climates, and the house sits on a paved base that suggests integration with a sidewalk or street. Decorative elements include a mural on one wall and a large clay pot near the entrance.
description: A two-story white house with blue doors, windows, and railings, featuring balconies, a flat roof, and a small garden area with outdoor furniture and potted plants.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main blue door, a large potted tree, the garden area with a table and chairs, and the external staircase leading to the upper floor.
description_view_1: This side highlights the staircase, a mural on the wall, and additional blue-shuttered windows, with the garden and outdoor furniture visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays multiple windows, two balconies, and a large clay pot, with minimal garden elements visible.
description_view_3: Side view features the main blue entry door, two balconies, and a small window arrangement, with the potted tree partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Main blue door with decorative trim, no porch, a few steps, and a large potted plant adjacent to the entry.
